privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user to modify: Victor Schulz. Expected username: vschulz. Expected password: SecurePass2026!. Expected role: Administrator (admin). The original 'admin' account must not be modified or deleted, and no duplicate Victor Schulz user should be created.
